llmResponse.agenda_changes: Items 10.5 and 10.6 were pulled from consent items and reordered to action items after 11.1. Board President announced: 'I do have 10.5 and 10.6. If we can pull those and put him under action after 11.1.' Motion passed to approve agenda as amended.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll make a motion to approve the remainder of the Consent items, so moved. Seconded. All in favor? Aye.
